one_time_description: Intercompany balances unable to be reconciled by management; adjusted as a charge to office expenses
economic_notes: Cliffdweller Inn operated as on-site hotel; Power Authority generates power for community; Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (Casino Rama) distributions received
notes: Audit is qualified due to unreconciled intercompany balances of $215,848 charged to office expenses. Prior period adjustment restated 2019 comparatives due to incorrect recording of deferred revenue and due from government organizations related to Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership. Budget information was not approved by Chief and Council. Fiscal year is 2020 but audit report is dated August 27, 2024 indicating significant delay in financial reporting. Accumulated surplus per statement ($25,912,578) differs from note 12 ($26,602,738) due to trust funds and other items. Net debt of $326,277 reported. expenses_enterprises represents Cliffdweller Inn ($40,504) plus Power Authority ($1,182,939). num_businesses set to 1 for Cliffdweller Inn hotel operation.
